programme.title: Life after life
programme.desc: When journalist Masha finally gives up trying to find happiness with Dmitry, an older man who was also her boss, she falls for the much younger Yuri Kozakov - handsome, attentive and seemingly wealthy. But after a hasty marriage, Masha soon begins to notices strange things about Yuri's lifestyle and behaviour. When Yuri leaves for a business trip, Masha hears footsteps in the house and sees a dark shadow in the garden. Soon she will learn Yuri's horrible secret and become threatened by mortal danger, but if she cannot save herself, who will come to her aid in her hour of need?

programme.title: Diamond Cartel
programme.desc: Only one lusted glance brings Aliya to the events throwing her into the criminal ocean. But in the wirliging of passions and turmoil when she finds herself at the verge of fatality it's only her true love that is the only rescue.Now the most important thing for Aliya is to preserve the honor and dignity and the whole world will be at our feet.

programme.desc: The film of two strangers, who meet on a bridge intending to commit suicide. After bonding over their shared miseries,they make a pact to live life to the fullest for the next 20 days and explore various adventures together. As they embark on this trip, they begin to develop feelings for each other, leading to a complex and emotional journey. Will they embrace their new-found love or stick to their original plan?

programme.title: Essentials! 70s Rock Groups
programme.desc: Turn it up loud for 2 hours of proper rock from the 70s - the decade that gave birth to Prog & Metal! Including Pink Floyd, Led Zeppelin, Black Sabbath, Alice Cooper, AC/DC & Queen

programme.title: Simon Bates Golden Hour
programme.desc: 60 minutes of hits & headlines from the year of 'Moonraker', 'Alien' & 'The Muppet Movie' and when 24 million people saw Penelope Keith in 'To The Manor Born' on TV.

programme.title: Simon Bates Golden Hour
programme.desc: 60 minutes of hits & headlines from the year Larry Grayson first shouted Shut That Door on 'The Generation Game' and Ted Rodgers rolled out his robotic dustbin on '3-2-1'.

programme.title: Simon Bates Golden Hour
programme.desc: 60 minutes of hits & headlines from the year Demis Roussos soundtracked 'Abigail's Party', Punk was the new scourge of society, but it was outsold by TV cop crooner David Soul!

programme.title: Simon Bates NEW Golden Hour: 1976
programme.desc: Another 60 minutes of heatwave hits & headlines from a year of contrasts - Punk, Dancing Queen, the Inter-City 125, the Honey Monster & that year's top toy - Swingball!

programme.title: Simon Bates Golden Hour
programme.desc: 60 minutes of hits & headlines from the year Margaret Thatcher became Tory leader, 'Ding A Dong" won Eurovision, and Fawlty Towers opened its doors for the very first time!

programme.title: Golden Hour: Xmas in the 80s!
programme.desc: Simon Bates with a special Golden Hour featuring 13 classics of the 1980s. From Jona Lewie in 1980 to Band Aid II in 1989.

programme.title: 20 Million Sellers of the 80s!
programme.desc: You know the songs, but do you know how many they sold? Leaving aside Xmas, these are the 20 million sellers of the decade. But only one sold over 2 million - can you guess?

programme.title: Turbo Trax!
programme.desc: A non-stop ticket to the ultimate retro rave! We crank up the neon and hit the dancefloor with the most electrifying feelgood music videos the 80s had to offer.

programme.title: Timmy Mallett's Brilliant 80s!
programme.desc: Loud shirts, foam mallet & 25 huge videos of the decade are ready to go as Timmy Mallett brings his Utterly Brilliant party to NOW 80s!

programme.title: We're Feelin' Xmas All Over!
programme.desc: This is the soundtrack to your Christmas festivities - 80s style! Only the big party & singalong tunes back to back!

programme.title: Pete Waterman's Xmas in the 80s
programme.desc: From Jona Lewie's classic "Stop The Cavalry" right through to Band Aid's second outing - these are the biggest Christmas Hits of the 1980s.

programme.title: Aerosmith: Rock Icons
programme.desc: An hour of Anthems and the biggest rock songs spanning over 20 years from rock legends Aerosmith!

programme.title: Weekend Rock Anthems
programme.desc: Your weekend anthems and the biggest rock songs from the last 50 years! From the Beatles and the Stones in the 60s right through to One Republic and Kings Of Leon in the 10s.

programme.title: Big Tunes
programme.desc: The 80s was the decade where rock & big hair were inseparable! Just look at Tina Turner, Bonnie Tyler, U2, White Snake & Marillion.

programme.title: Weekend Anthems!
programme.desc: Turn it up to 11 all weekend for the finest rock anthems! Featuring Kings Of Leon, The Killers, Green Day, Biffy Clyro & The Foo Fighters. This is Now Rock!

programme.title: Carol Decker's 90s Rock Chicks!
programme.desc: A decade of girls & guitars - from Republica & Catatonia to Cher & Debbie Harry.

programme.title: Weekend Anthems!
programme.desc: Turn it up to 11 all weekend for the finest rock anthems! Featuring Kings Of Leon, The Killers, Green Day, Biffy Clyro & The Foo Fighters. This is Now Rock!

programme.title: Monsters of Rock! 1990-1999
programme.desc: A definitive 6 hour marathon of 90s guitar anthems! From U2 to INXS, Blur to Bon Jovi, Skunk Anansie to Green Day, Metallica to Iron Maiden - 70 rock classics are here, in order!

programme.title: Hearts2Hearts 'FOCUS' Trailer
programme.desc: The album trailer captures the members' bold and free-spirited sides as they play around and dance together in a quiet space. In the latter part of the video, the title track “FOCUS” audio and part of the choreography are revealed, raising anticipation for the new release.Hearts2Hearts' first mini album FOCUS features a total of six tracks, including the title track “FOCUS,” the single “STYLE,” and the pre-release song “Pretty Please,” showcasing a diverse musical palette.

programme.title: Hearts2Hearts 'FOCUS' MV
programme.desc: Set against a school backdrop, the music video delicately captures the complex emotions between the members. Choreographed by Jo Na-In, the performance delivers a sleek and sophisticated atmosphere.Its lyrics sensually express the feeling of being completely focused on someone, offering a fresh glimpse into Hearts2Hearts' unique appeal. Hearts2Hearts' first mini album title track “FOCUS” is a house genre-based song that features a vintage piano riff and an addictive melody, showcasing the group's cool and chic vocal charm.

programme.title: NCT DREAM : They Were Here To Beat It Up Trailer
programme.desc: Centering on the theme of “the speed of time,” the album delivers a bold message that the members — who have been running toward their dreams since childhood — continue to grow, while confidently moving forward at their own pace and in their own way. The trailer “They Were Here To Beat It Up” wittily portrays NCT DREAM breaking through their limits and opening a new chapter of their own stage with surreal visuals and storytelling, powerfully setting the tone for the beginning of the new album.NCT DREAM's 6th mini album “Beat It Up” consists of six tracks, including the title track of the same name, “Beat It Up.”

programme.title: NCT DREAM 'Beat It Up' MV
programme.desc: The music video amps it up even more with a boxer concept, powerful moves, snappy cuts, and punch-heavy choreography that fires off the song's energy. The title track “Beat It Up” hits hard with bold kicks, heavy bass, and a vibe that's all about breaking limits with confidence. NCT DREAM's sixth mini album “Beat It Up” takes on the theme of 'the speed of time', sending a message that they're moving forward in their own pace and style.

programme.title: RIIZE 'Fame' Trailer
programme.desc: all captured through RIIZE's unique genre of “emotional pop.”It expresses the members' moments of anxiety, emptiness, and the intense emotions that arise amid their struggles, RIIZE's new single “Fame” is set to be released. Focusing on the unseen side of RIIZE's growth journey, the single features a total of three tracks, including the title track “Fame.”

programme.title: RIIZE 'Fame' MV
programme.desc: The lyrics reflect RIIZE's artistic vision, delivering the message that what they truly seek is not fame, but the sharing of emotions and love.The bold, forward-driving rhythmic structure combined with the raw texture of electric guitar creates a dynamic surge of energy. RIIZE's second single “Fame” is the group's first venture into a rage-style hip-hop track, expressing their artistic ideals as “emotional pop artists.”

programme.title: JUNGWOO 'SUGAR' MV
programme.desc: NCT JUNGWOO's first solo single “SUGAR” is a groovy pop song with swing‑infused drums, a witty bassline, and a smooth, catchy melody. The lyrics send a warm message of gratitude to fans, wishing that past memories and future moments are all sweet. The music video brings this sweetness to life with colorful, sugar-inspired visuals, while the performance highlights JUNGWOO's stylish movements and precise choreography, showcasing his unique stage presence.

programme.title: TAEYEON 'Panorama' MV
programme.desc: TAEYEON celebrates the 10th anniversary of her solo debut with the compilation album Panorama, featuring the Pop Rock title track “인사 (Panorama).” The song pairs vibrant piano, synths, and a strong drum line with soaring guitar riffs and TAEYEON's delicate yet powerful vocals. The music video presents a cinematic story of TAEYEON, who has lost her memory, and a girl who helps restore it — a metaphor for the bond between the artist and her fans, SONEs. Its emotional, road-movie-style visuals reveal SONEs as the hidden protagonist. The 24-track album offers a retrospective of her past decade, unfolding like a panorama of her solo journey.

programme.title: SoundTrek Ep.1
programme.desc: Korea's first gugak band formed by foreign residents <Sound Trek> embarks on its very first journey. From every corner of the world, foreign souls gathered in Korea, united by the timeless sound of gugak. Dreams trebble like the strings of a gayaguem. Before the masters of gugak they compete. Who will be the next five to begin the legend of Sound Trek?

programme.title: SoundTrek Ep.2
programme.desc: Finally, the five members of Sound Trek have been selected! From accordion, flute, and Morin Khuur to djembe, and even a Mexican sorikkun (Korean traditional singer), they are now ready to write a new page of gugak. Their mentor, Kwon Songhee, former lead vocalist of the band Leenalchi, believes their potential, supporting every step of their way.

programme.title: SoundTrek Ep.3
programme.desc: Gugak still feels unfamiliar to the members. But they never gave up. Then one day, a gugak expert joins them for an arrangement collab. Sound Trek decides to reinterpret the famous minyo(folk song), “Sarangga” in their own unique style.

programme.title: SoundTrek Ep.4
programme.desc: With one-on-one coaching from their mentors and countless hours of repeated practice, their skills have now reached new heights. Then, an exciting piece of news arrives — Sound Trek has been invited to perform at the Uzbekistan National celebration, the homeland of Alex!

programme.title: SoundTrek Ep.5
programme.desc: SoundTrek arrived in Uzbekistan with butterflies in their stomachs and successfully completed their performance to the crowd's applause. They proved that music knows no boundaries, and that even non-Koreans can perform gugak if they have enough passion. Their journey, however, is far from over.

programme.title: Rarest Gold Coin!
programme.desc: Secure the first year of issue 1907 No Motto Saint Gaudens Gold Double Eagle in Choice MS63 condition today. Only about 7% of the entire series are "No Motto", making it the rarest variety of the Saint Gaudens series and an essential key date!

programme.title: Rare 1920's Silver
programme.desc: This is your last chance to add the Set of 10 or 20 Silver Peace Dollars in Brilliant Uncirculated condition to your collection at these low prices! Boasting a magnificent design, this Silver Dollar celebrated the peace after World War I had ended.

programme.title: Rare 1920's Silver
programme.desc: This is your last chance to add the Set of 10 or 20 Silver Peace Dollars in Brilliant Uncirculated condition to your collection at these low prices! Boasting a magnificent design, this Silver Dollar celebrated the peace after World War I had ended.

programme.title: Silver Eagle Rarity
programme.desc: RCTV is offering a groundbreaking 2025 American Silver Eagle featuring the first ever Eagle privy mark, graded perfect MS70. This unique issue ties for the lowest mintage Silver eagle and marks the first time an Eagle has been seen on the obverse!

programme.title: Bloomberg Wall Street Week
programme.desc: A weekly program telling the stories of capitalism from around the world, David Westin in New York hosts.

programme.title: Bloomberg Next Africa
programme.desc: A monthly deep dive into Africa's biggest stories through a Bloomberg lens. Global investors see the continent as one of the top areas for opportunity and growth, and some African nations are well-positioned to be global hubs for development. This show will discuss key steps taken to help deliver on Africa's quest of bridging the gap with global powers, and track capital flows and the direction of funds amid the underlying political, economic and social developments.

programme.title: LEADERS With Francine Lacqua
programme.desc: S01E03 Francine Lacqua talks with Franklin Templeton CEO Jenny Johnson about how to steer a $1.6 trillion business amid the rise of AI, shifting politics and booming private markets.

programme.title: The Deal With Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly
programme.desc: Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly talk with Emmanuel Acho about his reinvention from NFL linebacker to media leader, his show "Uncomfortable Conversations" and his new effort, Speakeasy.

programme.title: Bloomberg Wall Street Week
programme.desc: A weekly program telling the stories of capitalism from around the world, David Westin in New York hosts.

programme.title: The Infinite Explorer with Hannah Fry

programme.title: The Deal With Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly
programme.desc: Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly sit with Peloton instructor and Vice President of Fitness Programming Robin Arzón about career pivots, managing talent and how she thinks about entrepreneurship.

programme.title: The Deal With Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly
programme.desc: Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly sit with Super Bowl winner and Goldman Sachs Managing Director Justin Tuck to talk about the pressure of playing in New York and his transition from football to finance.

programme.title: Power Players
programme.desc: Jason Kelly visits the UK's Motorsport Valley, where Williams Team Principal James Volwes and F1 Academy drivers' champion Abbi Pulling show how advanced simulation is shaping the future of Formula 1.

programme.title: Power Players
programme.desc: Jason Kelly follows Pierre Gasly from Alpine Headquarters to a Paris photo shoot to get a firsthand look at how the business of being an F1 driver goes far beyond the track.

programme.title: Power Players
programme.desc: Jason Kelly heads to Maranello, Italy, to speak with Ferrari's leadership about the coming regulatory changes for Formula 1 and how Ferrari's racing technology informs the road cars of today.

programme.title: Power Players
programme.desc: Jason Kelly joins Miami Grand Prix Managing Partner Tom Garfinkel as he tackles the complexities of putting on the race and F1 CEO Stefano Domenicali reveals why it is key to F1's future growth.

programme.title: Short Docs: Sports

programme.title: Agni Vayu
programme.desc: Agni Vayu Is A Romantic Thriller That Tells The Story Of A Young, Vibrant Dr. Agni And An Ambitious Investment Banker Vayu. As Their Love Blossoms, An Unfortunate Turn Of Events Happens That Throws Them Amid Conspiracy, Misunderstanding, Swindling, And All Sorts Of Paradoxes At Every Turn. They Set Out On A Journey To Unravel The Mystery Surrounding These Events. Can They Both Solve It Together And Will They Disclose Their Feelings To Each Other During The Journey.

programme.title: Do Chutki Sindoor
programme.desc: Vinayak and Siddhi live in Agra and Siddhi has a sister named Maya, who has a mental capacity of a 9-year-old. Siddhi takes full responsibility of Maya and ensures she is never left alone. Sunaina, their stepmother worries about Maya. Siddhi assures Sunaina that she will not marry until she finds someone who will take care of Maya. On the other hand, Vinayak who is the only son of rich and famous Jayadevi, a shrewd woman who despises the colour black. Vinayak and Siddhi's paths cross when Maya is about to get hit by Vinayak's car. Siddhi intervenes and saves Maya, but in anger slaps Vinayak for calling Maya "Pagal" (crazy). Vinayak realizes that he has fallen for Siddhi and promises to take care of Maya and marries Siddhi to seek revenge and make Maya suffer.

programme.title: Crime Files
programme.desc: It All Begins Around Us This Crime Show Explores Crimes That Occur Within Our Own Communities And Among People We Know. It Tells The Compelling Stories Of Ordinary Lives Disrupted By Crime, With Relatable Characters Representing The World Around Us. The Show'S Mission Is To Raise Awareness About Crime Prevention While Keeping Viewers Engaged And Intrigued."

programme.title: Laal Banarasi
programme.desc: The story highlights the exploitation happening with the ‘Bunkars' in Banaras, whose craft is appreciated all around the world, but they are paid peanuts by the traders. Amidst this, blooms a love story between the two opposites - Gauri, a bunkar and Garv, a trader. The story is of Gauri who belongs to the bunkar community facing series of incidents which destroys her family and swears to bring about a change in their life and stop the exploitation by directly trading the sarees. This becomes a battle with traders creating hurdles in her life but she is unstoppable.

programme.title: REINCARNATED AS A SWORD

programme.title: Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Juice is here to reveal to Jessica that he's a woman. Jolene has been sleeping with her sister's girlfriend, Stephanie! Chante doesn't approve of her sister's fiancée and won't hold her peace at their wedding!

programme.title: Jerry Springer
programme.desc: A woman has sex with her sister and brother-in-law a husband finds another lover a stripper pretends to be a cocktail waitress transvestite prostitute.

programme.title: Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Dustin admits to cheating on his partner with his middle-school crush psychic Nana says she has a premonition that her fiance is sleeping with her friend Desiree believes that another woman is contending with her over her boyfriend.

programme.title: Jerry Springer
programme.desc: A woman tells her bounty-hunter husband that she is cheating with a stripper, who turns out to be gay a woman finds out about her boyfriend's secret lover.

programme.title: Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Things were going great with his new girlfriend until Roger found himself in bed with her friend Kandy's boyfriend reveals a secret that could change her generous ways Dannisha's boyfriend continues to beg for a threesome.

programme.title: Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Nick is here to tell his soon to be wife Ashley that he's been cheating on her with two different women! Plus, Shea is here and worried sick that her husband Adam may have had a little too much fun on a recent trip the couple took together.

programme.title: Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Diamynn admits to hooking up with a man who has a girlfriend and a child Angel regrets kissing Brittany and does not want to rekindle a relationship with her Kaitlyn says her husband's floundering wrestling career is hard on their family.

programme.title: Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Katrina says that her emotional needs are not being met, so she started cheating with Michaell, a drag queen. Then John explains to his girlfriend that he has recently acquired a female "indentured servant."

programme.title: Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Angelica is unapologetic about sleeping with her twin's boyfriend Makayla confronts the woman with whom her children's father hooked up Stormy wants to take a shower with her friend Jessica.

programme.title: EXchange EP11
programme.desc: People are given 20 minutes to talk to their exes privately. Someone cries and the air changes.

programme.title: EXchange EP12
programme.desc: Secrets are gone. With everyone's feelings out in the open, people start eyeing each other.

programme.title: Cheese in the Trap EP14
programme.desc: The paper notes issue is raised again and Seol is injured. Jung decides not to stand by anymore.

programme.title: Cheese in the Trap EP15
programme.desc: In-ha tells Chairman Yoo a malicious lie about Seol. Then, Jung makes a final plan to remove In-ha.

programme.title: I Trained Like A Broadway Star For 6 Weeks
programme.desc: Michelle commits to an intense six week journey to train as a triple threat performer mastering singing, dancing, and acting under the guidance of professional Broadway coaches, all while preparing to bring an original musical to life on stage.

programme.title: I Tried Butler Academy
programme.desc: Michelle enrolls at the International Butler Academy alongside other students training to serve the highest levels of society.

programme.title: I Trained Like A Professional Gamer
programme.desc: Michelle spends a week training at the San Diego Lifeguard Academy facing grueling water rescues and training drills necessary to learn how to save lives.

programme.title: I Tried Planning My Wedding In A Week
programme.desc: Michelle and her fiancé Garrett take on the challenge of planning their entire wedding in just one week in hopes of turning months of decisions into one unforgettable, fun-filled seven-day sprint.

programme.title: I Climbed An 85ft Cliff With Only 1 Week of Training
programme.desc: Michelle trains for one week with professional rock climbers to attempt her first-ever ascent up an 85-foot cliff face.

programme.title: I Tried A Nuclear War Simulation
programme.desc: Michelle plays the role of Madam President in a high-stakes nuclear war simulation—where she has just 8 minutes to decide the fate of the world.

programme.title: I Tried Secret Service Academy
programme.desc: Michelle trains at the United States Secret Service Academy, experiencing firsthand the exclusive and demanding world of America's top protection agents.

programme.title: I Trained Like An Olympic Figure Skater
programme.desc: Michelle trains intensively for eight weeks with an Olympic-level figure skating coach, preparing to take on the challenge of a real competition while pushing her physical and mental limits.

programme.title: We Tried 17th Century Sailing
programme.desc: Michelle attempts to sail an 18th-century ship safely back to port with her novice crew.

programme.title: I Trained Like a NASA Astronaut
programme.desc: Michelle spends a week at NASA, training to flying fighter jets and learning how to preform high-pressure task in simulated zero gravity.

programme.title: I Trained Like A Victoria's Secret Model for 5 Weeks
programme.desc: Michelle follows the rigorous diet and workouts of Victoria's Secret models to uncover what it really takes to build and maintain the body of a professional swimsuit model.

programme.title: I Tried Etiquette School
programme.desc: Michelle attend a Beverly Hills etiquette school to learn modern manners, posture, and dining skills.

programme.title: Try Guys Volunteer With Rescue Dogs
programme.desc: We loved our experience volunteering with Rescue dogs for a day and hope we can encourage you guys to give it a try for yourselves!

programme.title: Try Guys Get Gen Z Makeovers
programme.desc: Today we're getting makeovers and transforming into Gen Z style icons! Which Try Guy will be your favorite soft boi?

programme.title: Try Guys Try Tattoos

programme.title: Try Guys Giant Spaghetti Pool (1,000 LBS) ft. Mark Rober
programme.desc: We did it y'all, we made a giant 1,000 LBS spaghetti pool! We hope you enjoyed this as much as we did and we want to encourage you all to donate whatever you can to support #TeamSeas!

programme.title: Try Guys Try Tap Dance
programme.desc: Make some noise for the Try Tappin Trio! Today we're trying ✨tap dance✨

programme.title: Try Guys Try Prom Dresses
programme.desc: It's prom season! We're living out our tulle dress, main character fantasies and trying on some iconic prom dresses! Who do you think will be crowned the prom queen?

programme.title: The Try Guys
programme.desc: The Try Guys get consultations from Dr. Diamond, a world-famous celebrity plastic surgeon, and are photoshopped with the most perfect version of their faces.

programme.title: Without a Recipe
programme.desc: Four inexperienced bakers. No recipes. One goal: try to bake a perfect holiday pie.

programme.title: Without a Recipe
programme.desc: Without A Recipe is officially back! Which batch of Try Guys cookies will bake it to the top?

programme.title: Without a Recipe
programme.desc: This week the guys are giving bagels a go, but which Try Guy will dough it right?

programme.title: Without a Recipe
programme.desc: Which Try Guy is gonna get served? Keep watching because we've got the scoop on Without A Recipe!

programme.title: Invention Story S02 EP 11
programme.desc: Carrot Town was once a low-tech community with candles, wind-up clocks, and woodburning stoves. Then a fluke came along – a free-thinking rabbit named SILAS HOPNER who invented a machine that could turn carrots into a fuel called Carrotsene (like kerosene).

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Monster plan S2 Ep 01
programme.desc: The crazy scientist, Doctor Rex Vector, and his hamster assistant, Mister Pete, return to Pine Tree Mountain with Vector's new, evil invention: a robo-monster complete with animal abilities. But first, Vector needs to collect these skills. He comes up with a power absorbing gadget, which he often disguises, in order to trap and steal abilities from the innocent animals. Vick, Briar and Bramble, along with other animal friends, must stand up against this “monster plan” of Vector's. It's going to be a fierce fight between wild animals and poaching villains.

programme.title: Fury Spinner Ep 11
programme.desc: After decades of development, Fury Spinner duel has become one of the most popular sports in the world. At this time, the "Ultimate Feast" Invitational Tournament of Fury Spinner began. The protagonist Meteo is invited to the mysterious island together with other top players in the world to embark on a survival adventure. During the adventure, Meteo not only relied on his determination to protect the weak and gained recognition to unlock the power of the sacred beast, but also got acquainted with the hidden master Kim who came here to find his brother and Joll who wanted to prove as the “perfect warrior” to his father. However, this "Ultimate Feast" tournament is just a conspiracy of the organizer Kenji! He wants to use the players to awaken the evil forces in the island to destroy the world! Meteo and friends stepped forward and tried their best to defeat Kenji.

programme.title: VIP Pets
programme.desc: We are the VIP Pets! The coolest pets with a passion for hair! We are best friends and together we will discover lots of beautiful hairstyles and go on exciting adventures!

programme.title: Tom' s Car Wash
programme.desc: Tom loves caring for his friends they can always count on Tom to tow them back to his car wash, where they' re guaranteed to leave sparking!

programme.title: Chefclub Kids
programme.desc: With Chefclub Kids, the little ones get their hands dirty all while having fun in the kitchen. Whether they' re learning to prepare dinner, bake goodies, or explore new flavors, Chefclub Kids is a way for children to gain confidence through cooking!

programme.title: Ryan Defrates
programme.desc: The Adventures of Ryan Defrates: Secret Agent is about a young spy with a whole lot to learn, who is paired with a very unlikely partner... his mom!

programme.title: Box Yourself

programme.title: Grojband
programme.desc: The story about 12 year old Corey that emotionally torments his sister so that she will write the ultimate lyrics for his garage band.

programme.title: Everybody Loves a Moose
programme.desc: An oddball buddy series between an over ambitious boy, Jack and his pal Moose, a melodramatic self-confessed expert in everything. Except he isn' t! Despite his best intentions, he always messes up and although Jack may not get what he want, you can' t help being sucked in by Moose' s relentless optimism and zest for life!

programme.title: Eliot Kid
programme.desc: When a tooth falling out turns into a hunt for the “giant mouse”, when the city's sewers transform into Indiana Jones' white rapids or when a trip to the toilets becomes an expedition to a haunted house, well then you've entered the wonderful world of Eliot Kid!

programme.title: Princess Play Time
programme.desc: The proud Princess likes to do things her own way, but her antics are always joined by her restless brother, Prince, who tends to turn everything topsy-turvy. Any playtime in their room transforms into a fantastic journey through unusual worlds: the children arrange a picnic on the Moon, conduct a detective investigation in a toy city, or search for pirate treasures on islands! Although initially, the Princess and Prince seem to clash and compete, by the end, they always find joy in each other' s company and that of their cherished dog, Bona.

programme.title: Pumpkin Reports
programme.desc: Max Green's new brother and sister are aliens sent to Earth as the advance party for an invasion - and he's the only one who can stop them turning humans into unwilling slave-gardeners.

programme.title: GoGo Bus S2 Ep 25
programme.desc: This series is about the adventures of the children, in a beautiful coastal town, who are learning and playing in Sunshine Forest Kindergarten. To keep the children safe, the kindergarten owner builds the world's first artificial intelligence school bus.

programme.title: Robinhood EP 36
programme.desc: Robin's house was burned to ashes by the order of Alwyn, the Baron of Nottingham. Robin and his cousins Will, Winifred and Jenny flee into Sherwood Forest, hoping to escape persecution. They end up encountering a group of bandits led by Little John, who dubs himself as Big John during the beginning of the series, until Robin pokes fun renaming him "Little John" for playing with a cat.

programme.title: Story of Masters
programme.desc: Dan Fogler explores how martial arts have been used by a range of warriors throughout the ages. From the ancient Terracotta Army in China to Japan's legendary samurai. How did martial arts forge empires and overcome the threat of modern weaponry?

programme.title: Story of Masters
programme.desc: For the final chapter of his journey into martial arts Dan questions how modern audiences engage and enjoy these ancient practices. From the excitement and drama of MMA arenas to legends of cinema like Bruce Lee and Korean director Crazy Doo.

programme.title: Car Crews with Supercar Blondie
programme.desc: Supercar Blondie goes to Hollywood arriving in a million dollar V12 Ferrari. In the ‘City of Angels' Alex is brought into contact with the Brotherhood of Racing, a community of drivers looking to create safe racing conditions for amateurs.

programme.title: Car Crews with Supercar Blondie
programme.desc: Given special access to a 2 million dollar exclusive McClaren Senna, Supercar Blondie digs under the surface to uncover gang feuds in the SLAB (Slow, Low and Bangin') community and meets up with legendary hip hop artists Slim Thug and Paul Wall.

programme.title: Classic Races
programme.desc: The Indy 500 is one of the most spectacular racing events in the world. More than 400.000 spectators watch this mixture of show and motorsports competition at the Indianapolis Motor Speedway each year. We take a look back at the 1994 Indy 500.

programme.title: Classic Races
programme.desc: Since its premiere in 1970 the Deutsche Rallye Meisterschaft has been one of the most popular motorsports series. In the 1983 competition Opel's Manta, Kadett and Ascona sports models celebrated exceptional successes.

programme.title: Classic Races
programme.desc: In 1985 Audi made their impressive mark in motorsports with the Quattro. With its 4x4 drive this model impressed the audience and shocked the competition alike and ushered in a new era in rally sports.

programme.title: Classic Races
programme.desc: After more than 20 years of abstinence Mercedes-Benz return to the Grand Prix circuit in 1954. With a lot of ambition, the company's advanced engineering and some of the best drivers in the world the Mercedes team aimed for the championship.

programme.title: Epic
programme.desc: Designed to captivate the intelligent young minds from class 5 to 10, EPIC INDIA QUIZ CHALLENGE is a one-of-a-kind quiz competition where teams from schools across India will fight for the crown of having the highest ‘IQ' i.e. India Quotient. The show follows a unique, tailored for a nail-biting climax, format as it tests the contestants' India Quotient, their knowledge of the country- its culture, history, geography, current affairs, and more. Known for his quick wit and charm, popular Bollywood singer and actor Meiyang Chang hosts the show that celebrates India and its diversity.

programme.title: Family Table
programme.desc: A family food game show wherein 2 families compete against each other by preparing their legacy dish. This is followed by celebrity guests presenting their own legacy dish, and challenging both the families to recreate the dish. The family which makes the best version wins an opportunity to dine with the celebrity guest, and celebrity chef Ranveer Brar.

programme.title: Lost Recipes
programme.desc: Lost Recipes is all about the food which is diffused into the pages of history and the rediscovery of a tradition that once was. Our host Aditya Bal is on a quest to unearth the once-popular culinary traditions through thirteen regions in India.But these recipes are no longer found in cookbooks, old or new, and seem to have evolved with time. Aditya must turn back the clock and wade through folk and lore to find the original, Lost Recipes.

programme.title: Raja Rasoi Aur Andaaz Anokha
programme.desc: After the resounding success of the first two seasons, EPIC Channel presents a revamped avatar of its Raja Rasoi series. EPIC Channel's Raja Rasoi series - titled Raja Rasoi Aur Andaaz Anokha - stands true to its name. While the lore and love of Indian food remains just as passionate, the new season presents a discovery oriented show format that transforms table-top cooking into an exciting food lab. Featuring renowned chef Ranveer Brar, the show will take you to his retreat – an old-world bungalow basking in the laidback vibe of Goa and then along on a ride nostalgia and rediscovery both personal and culinary. Ranveer's passion for culinary art makes him a perfect fit as the host for the latest season of the food series. He has dedicated this experimental streak and passion for food to his mentor – Munir Ahmed, a quaint, ordinary yet passionate food enthusiast from the gullies of Lucknow who greatly influenced Brar while growing up in his hometown.

programme.title: The Way Back Home
programme.desc: Rohan Thakur finds his true calling as he begins a journey to revisit his roots in Himachal Pradesh. Way Back Home is as much a travelogue of childhood, as of growing up. Get ready for a journey of a lifetime

programme.title: Kahi Suni
programme.desc: In a land steeped in mysticism, spirituality, and religion, the imagination of the followers has much room to flourish. Stories abound – some based on truth and some only on fractions of the truth. Nevertheless, these stories have enchanted their listeners for eons. Kahi Suni packs away our skepticism and takes us on a ride through the legendary tales of India. Each destination covered in the episodes has been the birthplace of a legend and each legend has given rise to the recognition of that location. Following our host from north to south and east to west, we journey through the land of myths of legends uncovering the origins of evIery story.

programme.title: Bharat Ratna The Jewels Of India
programme.desc: Bharat Ratna The Jewels of India is a show that celebrates the recipients of India's highest civilian honour. Through the medium of graphics and information, the show, intends to exhibit hidden unknown and loved stories from lives of these legendary characters.

programme.title: Regiment Diaries
programme.desc: The Indian Army is an emotion – a living chronicle of events, that we have the luxury to forget because they remember. The army itself is a family of several regiments, each of which has its own history, identity, and glorious traditions. Regiment Diaries is a tale of the Indian Army unlike any told before. Told by the very men who follow the illustrious feats of their predecessors, it tells timeless tales that warm the heart, moisten the eye, and leave you in awe of the bravest children of India.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: Mount Washington, New Hampshire has the dubious title of being home to the worlds worst weather. The highest wind ever recorded on the planet 231 miles per hour was recorded at its mountaintop observatory. To prepare for a mid-winter assault on the summit, Angry Planet host George Kourounis becomes a human popsicle, encased in ice in at the National Resarch Councils high speed wind tunnel. Then he and his sidekick Mark Robinson climb to the top of the mountain in mid-January and brave their way into a summit blizzard.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: One of the most exciting episodes of season one is Wild Water our look at Great White Sharks, water-filled caves and high voltage marine action.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: George Kourounis returns to Tornado Alley with three of his fellow stormchasers to see what the 2007 Storm Season will bring. Heading west to Crazy Horse Mountain, the team is in place for a huge storm sweeping through the Badlands of South Dakota.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: Avalanche danger is very high in the Rogers Pass area of the Trans Canada Highway in British Columbia. Host of Angry Planet George Kourounis travels with a variety of experts to bring down huge avalanches in the Rocky Mountains. Ski Patrollers throw hand charges to clear the slopes, the British Columbia Department of Highways uses helicopter bombing and mountaintop mortars to keep the roads safe, and the Canadian Armed Forces fire 105mm howitzers at the mountains to bring down the dangerous snow. Still, there are accidents and fatalities in the mountains. We meet Francois Desroisers, an avalanche burial victim who tells a terrible and tragic tale of a mountain disaster.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: George experiences the most extreme climates in North America. First he visits the hottest place on the continent Death Valley, then the coldest Snag, Yukon.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: Dominica, the most volcanic and mountainous island in the Caribbean, is home to the Boiling Lake, a large waterfall-fed lake of furiously boiling water. Adventurer George Kourounis becomes the first person ever to traverse across the lake on a rope, risking his life to take water samples and shoot video from a place no human has ever been. He then dives to the ocean floor off the coast of the island to explore vents where the superheated water bubbles into the ocean.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: We hope Season Two will give us the opportunity to make the quintessential Angry Planet show a full episode exploring a major hurricane that makes landfall in Florida or the Carolinas.

programme.title: Angry Planet

From Africa to Asia, they are targeted for their meat and immense fins.

programme.desc: The spiny lobster's claws may look small, but one swipe slices skin. Coyote takes a cut and explains this crustacean's anatomy.Tarpon are giant, fast, and aggressive. Coyote gets up close—and briefly inside—during this wild feeding encounter in the water.

programme.title: Don't Touch! – Up Close with a Rattlesnake!
programme.desc: Coyote gets dangerously close to a rattlesnake. With fangs bared and rattles shaking, he shows what happens when you get too near.An island crawling with dragons? Coyote explores a real-life dragon-infested zone where giant lizards roam freely—and dangerously.

programme.title: Would You Survive This Obstacle Course Challenge?!
programme.desc: Can you survive this wilderness obstacle course? Coyote takes on a challenge of physical grit and wild surprises in this action-packed adventure.One of the most dangerous snakes alive, the black mamba is captured and relocated safely with Coyote's help. A heart-pounding rescue mission.

programme.title: Spitting Cobra vs. My Face!
programme.desc: Face to fangs—Coyote encounters a spitting cobra. He tests how accurate its venom aim is and how to respond to this rare defense tactic.Coyote participates in a controversial conservation procedure: trimming a rhino's horn. He explains the reasons, risks, and impact of the act.

programme.title: Burned by a Giant Fireworm!
programme.desc: The giant fireworm brings the burn—literally. Mark handles this bizarre sea creature and ends up with chemical irritation on his skin.Coyote explores a lost island, teeming with mystery. From rare creatures to haunting terrain, this wild place holds unexpected surprises.

programme.title: BLITZ'N
programme.desc: Get ready for a special holiday BLITZ! with master mixologist Yvonne Langen as she prepares her favorite holiday cocktails and party snacks in the Gusto TV kitchen!

programme.title: The Wizard of Whatever: Holiday Edition
programme.desc: Gusto TV's Wizard of Whatever, Chef Kyle Crawford, is dishing up a holiday feast! There'll be food, fun, elves… and even jolly old St. Nick himself may make an appearance! Join in as Kyle cooks up a Christmas goose complete with stuffing and gravy, plus all the sides and salads, and even a flashy flambé dessert! Merry whatever!

programme.title: Flour Power Holiday Specials
programme.desc: Christmas is right around the corner and it calls for a little fun - like a twist on traditional holiday desserts! FLOUR POWER CHRISTMAS: TWISTS ON THE CLASSICS offers a new take on some of your favourites to bring you a fresh perspective and world of flavour for the holidays! Enchanting host Jessica McGovern plays off classic desserts, serving up handy hints on how to get the most out of every bite. From sweet and fluffy Gumdrop Cakes drizzled with a light lemony glaze to a delectable Eggnog Ski Slope Cake decorated with rosemary trees and a few friends to hit the hills, Jessica's unique holiday recipes will surly make it on your list of Christmas traditions!

programme.title: One World Kitchen: Our Favourite Holiday Recipes
programme.desc: In this special holiday episode of One World Kitchen, Hana (Japan), Vanessa (Italy), Natalia (Argentina), and Pailin (Thailand) get together to cook their favorite traditional holiday dishes influenced by their respective cultures. Christmas Sushi Rolls, Veal in a Creamy Tuna Sauce with Capers, Striped Bass in Garlic and Lime Marinade, and an epic Timballo. For the final recipe, our hosts combine all the flavors of One World Kitchen into a truly internationally-inspired turkey dish. (S1 E01)

programme.title: Bonacini's Italian Christmas
programme.desc: BONACINI'S ITALIAN CHRISTMAS is a heartwarming one-hour holiday special featuring celebrity Chef Michael Bonacini as he shares some of his favourite Italian Christmas Eve dishes. Michael invites us to the set of his series "Bonacini's Italy" to cook up traditional Italian fare like Salt Cod Mousse on Polenta Crostini and Pork Braised in Milk. Michael takes us on a holiday culinary journey as he explores homey Christmas flavours and traditions, offering tips for perfecting dishes from the regions of Veneto, Sardinia, Calabria, Sicily, and Emilia Romagna.

programme.title: Flour Power Holiday Specials
programme.desc: The holidays are here! And the holidays come with a lineup of treats you won't be able to resist! From sweet and salty to traditional and unconventional, FLOUR POWER CHRISTMAS: BIG WOW DESSERTS covers it all. To get in the holiday spirit, enchanting host Jessica McGovern introduces two desserts that could impress any Scrooge. First, Jessica bakes a decadent Chocolate Yule Log stuffed with a creamy Salted Caramel Frosting and finishes with a holiday-inspired cake decorated with homemade peppermint candy canes! Interwoven with tricks of the trade, Jessica guides us through her simple yet inspiring treats that are perfect for a big Christmas celebration.

programme.title: Spencer's Big Holiday
programme.desc: No matter how you celebrate the holidays, let Spencer Watts help you plan the menu, in SPENCER'S BIG HOLIDAY! In this festive one-hour holiday special, Spencer Watts is serving up some of his favourite holiday meals, treats, and drinks. Follow Spencer as he shows us how to sail through the hectic holiday season with style, from brunch to the moment the clock strikes midnight.

programme.title: One BIG Holiday Recipe
programme.desc: One BIG Recipe is all about cooking for family and friends and so are the holidays! Check out cool chef Kimberly Lallouz's take on holiday favourites in this special seasonal episode. Her first course is a Moroccan spiced Beet Latke with lightly dressed greens and creme fraiche. Next, whole fennel is braised tender, gratineed and spiked with apple chutney. Entrees include a one-of-a-king Turkey Breast 'Buche de Noel' roulade and a juicy, beefy espresso-red wine spiked Brisket roast. Along with her main course come her unique, single-serving Stuffin' muffins, two sauces, sugar snap peas and watermelon radishes. And don't leave without her sweet hostess gifts, White Chocolate Brittle-Bark and perfect Sugar Cookies. Happy Merry to all!

programme.desc: Professional photographer Virginia loves her cottage-style home in the city - but lately it doesn't love her back. A look that was once charming is now dated and in need of a serious makeover, starting with the worn out floors and ancient kitchen appliances. Designer Samantha Pynn applies eco-friendly kitchen ideas, energy saving appliances and 'up-cycles' existing items in the living room to create a beautiful Modern Country oasis in the city.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent
programme.desc: Sofie Kehdi heads back to Belize to help husband and wife team Rachel and Ben size up some resort properties. Along with their investors, Rachel and Ben are looking to purchase a resort on the island of Ambergris Caye that will provide the most bang for their buck. Each with a big personality of their own, it becomes clear this couple is not going to see eye to eye on what they want. Luckily for them, Sofie is a pro at mediating conflicts when it comes to real estate.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent
programme.desc: Julie and James are looking for a new home to raise their two boys. James is in the tech industry and would love an energy efficient home. Julie has her own dance studio and can't wait to get back to work after giving birth to her second son. Eve and Shawn are the perfect team for the job, especially with Timberworx's cutting edge "Net-Zero" project.

programme.title: Accidental Chef
programme.desc: Funky chef, Melvyn Lee, begins his culinary journey in Pampanga, Philippines. Known as the culinary centre of the Philippines, Pampanga is the place to go for foodies. Here, Melvyn visits two very different families- a celebrity artist, and a tribal chief, and experiences the Filipino life and cuisine in a whole new light.

programme.title: Accidental Chef
programme.desc: This week, Melvyn stops over in Hanoi, Vietnam. The capital of the nation, Hanoi boasts more than 1000 years of history. Along with that, comes a long-standing history of traditional cuisine with many famous delicacies. Melvyn visits a Vietnamese rice farmer, where he experiences a typical Vietnamese home cooking. Then he hangs out with a culinary artisan who has been living in the city for many generations and learns what it takes to cook an authentic Hanoi cuisine.

programme.title: Design For You: Trends

programme.desc: In episode 1 of Duncan's Thai Kitchen, Duncan travels to the white sandy beaches that line the gulf of Thailand, and visit the bustling night markets in Hua Hin and Chantaburi.

programme.title: The Beet
programme.sub-title: Unlocking Your Garden with Meagan Lloyd
programme.desc: Garden-to-table meals are achievable at home! Kevin chats with Meg about her growth as a gardener.

programme.title: The Beet
programme.sub-title: Growing Food In Extreme Places with Shannie McCabe
programme.desc: Is gardening in Florida difficult? Shannie shares her experiences gardening in different climates.

programme.title: The Beet
programme.sub-title: Cranking the Summer Veggie Vibes with Jacques Lyakov
programme.desc: Discover "crank mode" in the garden and how to enable it in your own garden next season!

programme.title: Soil Building and Compost
programme.desc: Discover how cover crops work and learn about the many methods to compost kitchen scraps.

programme.title: Amazing Alliums
programme.desc: If onions, leeks, and other alliums cause you trouble, we provide tips you need to succeed!

programme.title: The Beet: A Podcast for Plant Lovers

programme.desc: Explore a world of plants with superpowers with Brit horticulturist and TV presenter David Domoney!

programme.title: The Beet
programme.sub-title: Support Your Garden's Ecosystem with David Mizejewski
programme.desc: National Wildlife Federation naturalist David explains why keeping leaves where they fall matters.

programme.title: The Beet
programme.sub-title: Quitting His Day Job To Feed Canada with "Potato Ty" Heppell
programme.desc: The "potato papas" get together to talk about farming potatoes and the life of a career farmer.

programme.title: National Parks Adventure
programme.desc: A team of modern day explorers take an off-trail adventure through the national parks of the USA, showing the awe-inspiring beauty found within America's most legendary outdoor playgrounds.

programme.title: Epic Trails
programme.desc: Eric explores Utah's breathtaking slot canyons on a multi-day backpacking adventure.

programme.title: Epic Trails
programme.desc: Eric travels to the mountain towns of Durango and Telluride, Colorado to explore the backcountry by ski, snowshoe, and ice axe.

programme.title: Into America's Wild
programme.desc: Step off the beaten path and connect to your inner trailblazer in this cross-country journey to some of the most beautiful but little-known landscapes of North America.

programme.title: Soul of The South
programme.desc: Join writer and photographer Johny Pitts as he journeys along the Civil Rights Trail through the American South. From Tennessee to Mississippi to Alabama, discover the people and the places, the music, food, and culture, linked to this pivotal period in world history.

programme.title: Epic Trails
programme.desc: Eric treks the canyons and waters of Lake Powell, Utah on foot and via packraft.

programme.title: Epic Trails
programme.desc: Eric leaves the backcountry to discover urban hiking adventures in the cities of Los Angeles and San Francisco, California.

programme.title: Epic Trails
programme.desc: Eric Hanson seeks new adventures on the Maah Daah Hey Trail in North Dakota's Theodore Roosevelt National Park.

programme.title: Destination Route 66
programme.desc: Route 66 is lined with wonderful and informative attractions. Here are just a few of those must-see stops!

programme.title: Destination Route 66
programme.desc: Mother Nature along the Mother Road. Check out these can't miss natural wonders on Route 66.

programme.title: Destination Route 66
programme.desc: Rest your head after a long day driving Route 66. Check in to these great accommodations along the way!

programme.title: Small Town, Big Story
programme.desc: Just two hours north of Charlotte, Banner Elk offers a wide array of year-around activities for outdoor enthusiasts, but is most well known for their annual Highland Games, one of the largest celebrations of Scottish culture and tradition anywhere in the world.

programme.title: One Perfect Day in Kentucky
programme.desc: In "One Perfect Day in Kentucky," BFF's Kimberly and Elsa bring their shared competitive streak to the Bluegrass State, facing off to find out who can plan the perfect Kentucky day. Each is determined to delight - and outdo - the other with unforgettable experiences that showcase the state's rich culture. Elsa kicks off the competition with a classic Kentucky breakfast, a recipe she learned from top Chef Ouita Michel at her Holly Hill Cooking Studio. Elsa wins the first point, but Kimberly's ready to up the ante, whisking Elsa away for a thrilling cave kayaking adventure at the Gorge Underground. As they ride the chairlift to the top of the stunning Natural Bridge, the rivalry kicks into high gear and they go head-to-head in a trivia battle. The next surprise – a toast with Kentucky's own Ale-8 soda , sourced by Kimberly straight from the factory only whets their whistles. At the Keeneland Racetrack they sip some spirit forward Keeneland Breezes while Elsa reveals all she has learned about racehorses from a visit to renowned trainer Mark Simms Jr. ‘s horse barn. A Betologist gives them a quick lesson on wagering and Kimberly's horse wins the race. At Louisville's Trouble Bar, Kimberly shares her newfound knowledge of Kentucky bourbon production from a tour and tasting at Castle + Key distillery and makes Elsa One Perfect Drink.
